terms.definition: Models that accept more than text—e.g., images plus prompts—on supported Claude tiers.
An API pattern where Claude requests calls to external tools (functions, search, code runners) that your application executes and returns results from.
A mode on eligible models where Claude may perform deeper internal reasoning before producing a final answer for hard problems.
API-supported responses constrained to a schema or JSON shape so downstream code can parse fields reliably.
